summary: Loading state correctly displays with appropriate heading and data table structure. The screen meets the spec requirements for the loading state with proper admin interface styling.

violations.description: Loading state shows table structure with skeleton/placeholder rows which could be more visually distinct from actual data rows to prevent user confusion during load

actions: Consider adding more distinctive loading indicators or skeleton UI patterns to clearly differentiate loading state from actual data
Verify that loading state resolves quickly to either unavailable dataset or customer data as specified in screen spec
